Here's an easy solution: A tactic I like to call "The Sniper Method"

Shoot a tank, run behind the palace, then shoot again, rinse and repeat.

Enemies only focus fire on the last placed you were attacked from, and no one ever reaches behind the palace, so you can hide behind it to heal if you've been taking too much damage.
